calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Wednesday, July 30, 2008: Michael Sherwood Rossoff, counsel for plaintiff Mimi Li, who is also present; Sundeep Patel, Esquire, by limited scope representation of defendant, Carolyn L. Payne, who is also present

Settlement conference is held. The case is settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is not filed with the Court this day. The August 4, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
